message:
fix(security): harden flow lattice with trusted-receipt-authorizer and replay-linkage checks

Add two new fail-closed security checks to Ir2FlowLattice:

1. Trusted receipt authorizer: declassification receipts are now rejected
   unless their signing key has been explicitly registered via
   trust_receipt_authorizer(). This prevents unauthorized keys from
   satisfying declassification obligations.

2. Replay-linkage verification: receipts must match the current trace_id,
   preventing cross-trace receipt replay attacks.

Both checks are enforced before the obligation is consumed, preserving
the use count on rejection. Adds unit tests for untrusted-authorizer and
cross-trace-replay scenarios, and updates all existing flow lattice and
IFC integration tests to register trusted authorizers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
